name: Diabetic Retinal Eye Exam Codes
description: CPT and HCPCS codes for diabetic retinal eye examinations, including dilated fundus exams, retinal photography, and ophthalmologic evaluations. Used in the CDC eye exam measure for members with diabetes.
source: Public CMS/clinical references — placeholder for official NCQA value sets

codes.description: Ophthalmological services: medical exam and evaluation, intermediate, new patient
Ophthalmological services: medical exam and evaluation, comprehensive, new patient
Ophthalmological services: medical exam and evaluation, intermediate, established patient
Ophthalmological services: medical exam and evaluation, comprehensive, established patient
Ophthalmoscopy, extended, with retinal drawing, initial
Ophthalmoscopy, extended, with retinal drawing, subsequent
Imaging of retina for detection or monitoring of disease; remote, unilateral or bilateral
Imaging of retina for detection or monitoring of disease; with physician review, interpretation and report, unilateral or bilateral
Fluorescein angioscopy with interpretation and report
Fluorescein angiography with interpretation and report
Indocyanine-green angiography with interpretation and report
Fundus photography with interpretation and report
Dilated retinal eye exam with interpretation by ophthalmologist or optometrist documented and reviewed
7 standard field stereoscopic retinal photos with interpretation documented and reviewed
Eye imaging validated to match dilated eye exam documented and reviewed
